title: How a Man of God Leads When It Costs Him First
caption:
Every group has a leader by title and a leader by cost. Only one of them people actually follow.

Christ didn't lead by announcing He was in charge. He led by washing feet, taking blame that wasn't His, and walking first into the one thing nobody else could carry.

That's the pattern. The first apology. The job nobody wants. The hit that was never yours to take. The hard conversation everyone's been avoiding. None of it looks like leadership from the outside. All of it is.

"Greater love has no one than this, that someone lay down his life for his friends." — John 15:13

You don't need a title to lead like that. You need to go first.

Save this for the next room you're tempted to lead from the back of.

#faith #christianmen #leadership #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #christianity
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
